/MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:90 D/ADDL CTS:30/X:SENTENCE IS FOR 6 MONTHS OF COUNTY JAIL, DEFENDANT IS TO DO 90 DAYS WITH 30 CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED AND THE REMAINING 90 DAYS IS STAYED PENDING COMPLETION AND COMPLIANCE WITH CJC PROGRAMS,/PROB EXT:09-17-12/
